heroSubtitleComplete: Results are shown below. Reset to run another detection.
heroSubtitleInitial: Locate faces in an image with bounding boxes and scores (OpenCV detect pipeline).
chooseOneDescription: Scan with your camera or upload a photo. Either option works for this demo.
cameraSubtitle: Open the camera and align your face in the frame
uploadSubtitle: Select an image file from your device instead
uploadSecondary: JPEG or PNG from your gallery
apiRefLinkSuffix: (face detection overview, sample payloads, and response shape).
apiRefBody: This demo calls the same POST /v2/face-recognition/detect route using min_score and search_mode as required by the current API validation. Optional collection_id and max_results are supported by the client but not exposed in the form below.
apiRefEndpointDesc: Returns detected faces with geometry and scores. The published Face Detection guide also documents optional flags such as return_landmarks where supported.
paramImageDesc: Base64 probe image (raw base64 or data URI per API)
paramCollectionIdDesc: Optional scope (not used in this demo UI)
paramMaxResultsDesc: Optional cap (not used in this demo UI)
bulletApiClient: This demo uses detectFace from @humanauthn/api-client with your session token.
bulletSearch: For 1:N identification after capture, use Face Search or Search Live Face from the related docs.

0.title: Face Search (1:N)
0.description: Search by face image against enrolled persons.

1.title: Face Search 1:N (Live)
1.description: Liveness on the probe image, then 1:N search.

2.title: Face Search 1:N (Active User)
2.description: 1:N search without liveness for active-session flows.

3.title: Liveness Detection
3.description: Determine if a face is live vs spoof; liveness score.

4.title: Face Comparison
4.description: 1:1 face comparison to verify identity against a reference image.

5.title: Compare with Liveness
5.description: 1:1 comparison plus liveness detection with configurable thresholds.
